title: Kranj, Kranj — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Kranj, Kranj: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Kranj is a city in Kranj with a population of 37,373. The capital of the Gorenjska region, the birthplace of poet France Prešeren, with a historic old town and proximity to the stunning Lake Bled and Triglav National Park.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
